_doc: Recent stallion movements: relocations, deaths, pensionings, delayed retirements. Each entry must cite a primary source (BH/TDN/Paulick/farm announcement). Hand-curated from audit work — when the audit framework surfaces a new movement, append here with the citation. ZERO FABRICATION rule applies.

_schema.stallion: Display name as shown in scores.json
_schema.from_farm: The US farm the stallion was at (or '—' if N/A)
_schema.type: deceased | pensioned | relocated_intl | relocated_us | shuttle | delayed_retirement
_schema.destination: Where they went (farm + country/state). Null for deceased/pensioned/delayed_retirement.
_schema.note: One-line context — what makes this notable
_schema.still_in_db: true if we still track foals from this stallion (deceased/pensioned often kept; relocated_intl usually removed)

movements.note: Euthanized due to acute laminitis at age 14. Was announced for 2026 at $12,500.
Euthanized December 19, 2024. Sire of Nyquist, Outwork, etc.
Permanently relocated after first SH season. BH stallion register page now returns 'Stallion Not Found' for US listing.
MGISW (BC Classic 2021) relocated to Korea for 2026.
Dual-surface G1 winner, son of Heart's Cry. Returns 'Sunday Silence blood' to Japan.
Sold to stand in South Korea — no longer at Claiborne.
Sold to Japan in 2023. Sire of Honor A.P., still at Lane's End.
G1 winner relocated to Arkansas for 2026 — no longer at Coolmore.
Listed on Airdrie's Oct 8 announcement; relocated subsequently. #1 California sire by 2025 progeny earnings.

movements.destination: Japan (NH 2026 only; returns to Ashford afterward)
movements.note: Triple Crown winner shuttling to Japan for 2026 NH season. We track US foals only.
Pensioned at age 26 from stud duty. Still at Lane's End in retirement. Kept in DB for ongoing foal tracking — sire of Senor Buscador (G1 Saudi Cup).
Pensioned for 2026 (correctly absent from our database).
Pensioned for 2026 (correctly absent from our database).
Preakness winner remains in training for 2026; will retire to Ashford for 2027 (not 2026 as originally planned).
